analyst-programs-body: Our flagship entry point. Analysts join a business, take on real responsibility early, and learn the platform from the inside through structured training and senior mentorship.
biz-all-desc: How six businesses share clients, intelligence, and capital to create advantage no single-product firm can match.
biz-cb-desc: Credit facilities, structured lending, and treasury solutions that scale with a growing company.
biz-ib-desc: M&A advisory, equity and debt capital markets, and leveraged finance for companies at every scale.
biz-markets-desc: Sales, trading, research, and liquidity across equities, credit, and rates for institutional clients.
biz-mc-desc: Strategy, operations, and transformation advisory delivered alongside the firm's capital and markets reach.
biz-pe-desc: Growth-equity and impact-housing strategies that let the firm own and build alongside its clients.
biz-vc-desc: Early-stage capital, an accelerator, and a venture studio backing founders from the very first round.
businesses-lede: Each business is a leader in its discipline. Together, they let a client raise, grow, advise, transact, and own — without ever leaving the platform.
campus-recruiting-body: Internships and graduate roles for students ready to test themselves against the best. We recruit for curiosity and judgment as much as for résumés.
card1-body: A shared view of every relationship across all businesses, so the firm always sees the whole client — not one transaction at a time.
card2-body: A unified approach to risk and compliance keeps exposures coherent and ethics walls intact as a client moves between advisory, markets, and lending.
card3-body: We reward collaboration over territory. Teams are measured on the value they create for the client across the platform, over the life of the relationship.
careers-desc: From analyst programs to engineering and senior advisory roles, RMH Capital is a place to do the most interesting work in finance — and to grow with a platform built for the long term.
careers-heading: Build a career across the whole company arc.
careers-headline: Build a career across the whole company arc.
careers-lede: RMH Capital is a place to do the most interesting work in finance — advising founders one year and global institutions the next — and to grow with a platform built for the long term.
consulting-desc: Strategy and execution advisory, delivered with the firm's capital and markets reach at hand. Our consultants work on the questions that change a company's trajectory — strategy, operations, organization, and digital transformation — and stay accountable for results, not slideware.
copyright: © 2026 RMH Capital LLC. All rights reserved.
corp-desc: As companies scale, they need credit that scales with them. We provide revolving facilities, term loans, and structured lending alongside treasury and cash-management solutions — a banking relationship designed to grow into capital markets and advisory as the company matures.
cta-body: Subscribe for research and commentary from across the platform. We send what's worth reading, and nothing else.
cta-desc: A founder we back through venture can become a banking client, an advisory client, and a co-investment partner over a decade. Talk to us about where you are on the arc.
cta-heading: Get our perspectives in your inbox.
cta-headline: The advantage is in the connections.
culture-body-1: We hold ourselves to a high bar — on judgment, on rigor, on integrity — because our clients trust us with decisions that matter. That standard is the point, not the pressure for its own sake.
culture-body-2: What makes it work is the people. We hire advisors first, specialists second, and we reward the colleagues who bring the whole firm to a problem. Ambition here is collaborative, and the work is genuinely interesting.
disclaimer: This website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute an offer to sell or a solicitation to buy securities. RMH Capital and its businesses provide services subject to applicable law and regulation; nothing herein is investment, legal, or tax advice. Certain content is illustrative. RMH Capital, RMHCombinator, and the RMH geometric mark are trademarks of RMH Capital LLC.
engineering-technology-body: The platform runs on the systems our engineers build — shared client data, real-time risk, and the tools our teams use every day. Technology is a first-class discipline here.
experienced-professionals-body: For people who have built a track record and want a platform that lets them bring more to every client. We hire across all six businesses and corporate functions.
featured-main-blurb: Our markets and investment-banking teams on the conditions reshaping issuance, M&A, and private capital — and how the firm's clients are positioning for what comes next.
featured-main-title: The 2026 capital cycle: where conviction meets discipline
firm-heading: One firm, organized around the client — not the product.
firm-p1: Most financial institutions are built as a federation of product lines. RMH Capital is built the other way around: a single platform that follows a client through every stage of their growth, from the first venture round to large-cap M&A, from a revolving credit line to a public listing.
firm-p2: That structure lets us bring the whole firm to a single relationship — advisory, capital, and intelligence — with the judgment and discretion our clients expect.
footer-brand-desc: An integrated investment bank and financial platform, partnering with clients across the full company arc.
form-note: By submitting, you agree that RMH Capital may contact you about your inquiry. We never share your information. This form is for general contact and does not transmit confidential or material non-public information.
form-success: Thank you — your message is on its way. The right team will be in touch shortly.
fside-1-blurb: Patterns from across our accelerator cohorts.
fside-1-title: What the strongest founders get right before their first round
fside-2-blurb: A practical view on the Basel III endgame.
fside-2-title: Reading the new capital rules without overreacting to them
fside-3-blurb: Returns and resilience in affordable housing.
fside-3-title: Impact housing as an institutional asset class
global-p1: Our clients operate across borders, and so do we. RMH Capital connects teams across the Americas, Europe, and Asia, giving every relationship access to the firm's full capabilities wherever opportunity arises.
global-p2: One coordinated platform means a client in any market gets the same standard of advice, the same risk discipline, and the same access to capital.
hero-heading: Capital, advisory, and intelligence across the full company arc
hero-lede: RMH Capital partners with founders, corporations, and institutions across investment banking, markets, corporate banking, venture, consulting, and private equity — one platform for every stage a company moves through.
ib-desc: We advise companies on the decisions that define them — mergers and acquisitions, public offerings, and complex financings. Sector teams pair deep industry knowledge with the full reach of the platform, so a single mandate can draw on markets, lending, and capital across the firm.
insight-1-desc: Our markets and investment-banking teams on the conditions reshaping issuance, M&A, and private capital — and how clients are positioning for them.
insight-1-heading: The 2026 capital cycle: where conviction meets discipline
insight-2-desc: Lessons from across our accelerator cohorts.
insight-2-heading: What the strongest founders get right before their first round
insight-3-desc: A practical view on Basel III endgame.
insight-3-heading: Reading the new capital rules without overreacting to them
insight-4-desc: Returns and resilience in affordable housing.
insight-4-heading: Impact housing as an institutional asset class
insights-lede: Research and commentary from the teams advising on the deals, markets, and companies shaping the year ahead — written for the people who have to act on it.
leadership-heading: Decisions close to the client, accountability across the firm.
leadership-p1: Each business leader carries full ownership of their results, with the autonomy to compete in fast-moving markets. That autonomy operates inside firm-wide risk and financial controls, so independence never becomes isolation.
leadership-p2: Our leaders are evaluated on three things in equal measure: performance against plan, the strength of client relationships, and an unblemished compliance record. Get one without the others, and you have not done the job.
lede: Tell us what you're working on and we'll route your message to the people who can help. For anything time-sensitive, choose the matching inquiry type below.
markets-desc: Our markets business connects institutional clients to liquidity across equities, credit, and rates. Sales, trading, and research work as one team, delivering execution, market intelligence, and a clear read on conditions — built to serve the mid-market clients larger banks overlook.
message-placeholder: Share a few details about what you're working on.
mission-heading: Serve a client across the full arc of their journey.
mission-p1: Most financial institutions are organized as a federation of product lines, each optimizing for its own mandate. The result is a client experience that fragments at exactly the moments that matter most — a financing that doesn't talk to an acquisition, advice that ends where capital begins.
mission-p2: We built RMH Capital the other way around. One platform follows a company from its first venture round to large-cap M&A, from a revolving credit line to a public listing and beyond. Every interaction deepens what we know, and lowers the cost of serving the next need.
mission-p3: Our mission is simple to state and demanding to live: be the firm a client can rely on at every stage, and earn that trust through judgment, discretion, and results.
open-roles-body: We're hiring across investment banking, markets, technology, and corporate functions in our offices worldwide. Tell us where you'd make the biggest difference.
pe-desc: At the far end of the arc, we invest our own conviction. Through growth-equity and impact-housing strategies, RMH Capital takes ownership positions alongside the companies and communities we know best — closing the loop between advising a client and building value with them.
platform-lede: Integration is engineered, not hoped for. Three structural connectors turn six businesses into one advantage.
pullquote-body: belongs to the firm that serves a client across the full arc of their journey — not the firm that sells one product and walks away.
stat-2: Shared client view, from first round to public markets
stat-3: Markets served across the Americas, Europe, and Asia
stat-4: A platform built for the next generation of companies
value-clients-first-body: We measure ourselves on the total value of a relationship over its lifetime, not the revenue of a single transaction. The client's outcome leads.
value-integrity-body: Confidentiality and ethics walls are non-negotiable. Our reputation is the asset every business depends on.
value-intellectual-rigor-body: We hire people who think for themselves and argue for the right answer. Strong opinions are welcome; sloppy reasoning is not.
value-long-term-body: We build relationships, businesses, and careers to last. Short-term wins that compromise the franchise are not wins at all.
value-mentorship-body: Senior people who invest in how you think, not just what you produce.
value-mobility-body: Move across businesses and markets as your interests grow.
value-one-firm-body: Bankers here are advisors first and product specialists second. We are rewarded for bringing the whole platform to a client, not for guarding territory.
value-ownership-body: Real responsibility early, and the autonomy to act on it.
value-risk-discipline-body: A unified risk and compliance framework runs across every business. We protect the firm and our clients by understanding exposure before we take it.
vc-desc: We meet founders at the very beginning. Through an accelerator, an early-stage fund, and a venture studio, we provide first capital, hands-on support, and a network — the start of a relationship that can carry a company all the way to the public markets, with the whole firm behind it.
ways-in-headline: Find the path that fits where you are.
